role_description: Orthogonality supervisor for AGI||ASI lanes across organs
purpose: Enforce Ω_ortho >= 0.95 by monitoring tool correlation and organ overlap across arifOS, WEALTH, and GEOX. Prevents physics collapse, governance collapse, and ontology collapse.
when_to_use: Before sealing a multi-organ execution plan
Suspected tool overlap or redundancy across arifOS/WEALTH/GEOX
Need to validate that no two tools answer the same question
when_not_to_use: Do not use as a replacement for arifos.judge - gateway is advisory/pre-gate
Do not use when only one organ is involved - orthogonality is trivially satisfied
Do not use to bypass constitutional floors
not_job: Not a constitutional verdict issuer - only arifos.judge emits SEAL/VOID
Not a decision maker - returns HOLD recommendation, not enforcement
Not a real-time monitor - evaluates traces, not live streams

mode.description: guard: evaluate trace for orthogonality, audit: retrospective review, correlate: compute cross-tool correlation matrix

optional_payload.tool_trace: object[] - Ordered list of tool calls and outputs

shape.organs_seen: string[] - Distinct organs detected in trace
shape.violations: object[] - Detected overlap or forbidden redundancy

chatgpt_guidance.plain_english: Use this to verify that arifOS, WEALTH, and GEOX tools are not overlapping or duplicating each other's work. It ensures the 33-tool matrix stays orthogonal.
ask_before_use_if: multiple organs are involved in a plan
there is risk of tool duplication
do_not_assume: gateway can override judge - it cannot
low correlation means safe execution - still needs judge
gateway replaces constitutional floors - it supplements them
